name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> Idle]

(* Transition: a process can move from Idle to Trying *)
Try(i) == state[i] = Idle /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]

(* Transition: a process can move from Trying to Critical if no other is Critical *)
Enter(i) == state[i] = Trying /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # Critical /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical]

(* Transition: a process can exit Critical to Idle *)
Exit(i) == state[i] = Critical /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : Try(i) \/ Enter(i) \/ Exit(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in Critical *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => state[i] # Critical \/ state[j] # Critical

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
Init == participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"] /\ state = participants /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> {}] /\ decision = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
Prepare == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared" \forall i \in 1..N]

(* Participant votes Yes or No *)
Vote(i, v) == /\ state[i] = "Prepared"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed" \iff v = "Yes"]
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = votes[i] \cup {v}]

(* Coordinator decides Commit if all Yes, else Abort *)
DecideCommit == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Committed"]
                 /\ decision' = [decision EXCEPT !["Commit"]]
DecideAbort == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Committed"]
                /\ decision' = [decision EXCEPT !["Abort"]]

Next == Prepare \/ \E i \in 1..N : Vote(i, "Yes") \/ Vote(i, "No") \/ DecideCommit \/ DecideAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper to check if philosopher i can eat *)
CanEat(i) == forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = 0

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "thinking" /\ CanEat(i)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = 1]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "eating"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = 0]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "hungry"
       /\ state' = state
       /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>> 
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1) (* placeholder for produced value *)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q) (* placeholder for consumed value *)
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Servers, NULL, Subset

(* State space *)
VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State predicates *)
Follower == state = "Follower"
Candidate == state = "Candidate"
Leader == state = "Leader"

(* Term and vote tracking *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
        /\ state = "Follower"

(* Candidate election *)
RequestVote ==
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ state' = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![SELF] = SELF]

Vote ==
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor

(* Leader election *)
LeaderElection ==
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ \E votes \in Subset(Servers) : \card(votes) > N/2
  /\ state' = "Leader"

(* State transitions *)
Next ==
  \/ RequestVote
  \/ Vote
  \/ LeaderElection

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers - 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan

VARIABLES state, channel, marker

(* state[p] is the local state of process p *)
(* channel[c] is the sequence of messages in channel c *)
(* marker[c] is TRUE if a marker has been received on channel c *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]

Send(p, q, m) == 
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

Receive(p, q, m) ==
  /\ channel[(p, q)][1] = m
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Tail(channel[(p, q)])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ state'[p] = state[p] + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>

SendMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

ReceiveMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ channel[(p, q)][1] = "marker"
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Tail(channel[(p, q)])
  /\ marker'[(p, q)] = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

Next ==
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc: Send(p, q, "msg")
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc: Receive(p, q, "msg")
  \/ \E p \in Proc: RecordState(p)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc: SendMarker(p, q)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc: ReceiveMarker(p, q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

Init ==
  /\ ballots = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
  /\ promises = [a \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
  /\ accepts = [a \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
  /\ chosen = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N :
        /\ ballots[p] < ballots[p] + 1
        /\ promises[a] = <<>> \/ promises[a][1] <= ballots[p]
        /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = <<ballots[p], p>>]
        /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
        /\ accepts' = accepts
        /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
        /\ promises[a] = <<ballots[p], p>>
        /\ accepts[a] = <<>> \/ accepts[a][1] <= ballots[p]
        /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = <<ballots[p], v>>]
        /\ ballots' = ballots
        /\ promises' = promises
        /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
        /\ \A b \in 1..N : accepts[b] = <<b, v>>
        /\ chosen' = <<v>>
        /\ ballots' = ballots
        /\ promises' = promises
        /\ accepts' = accepts

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES sent, acked, retransmits

Init == /\ sent = <<>>
       /\ acked = <<>>
       /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(File) |-> 0]

Next == \E i \in 1..Len(File) :
          /\ i <= Len(sent) + 1
          /\ sent' = Append(sent, File[i])
          /\ \E lost \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ acked' = IF lost THEN acked ELSE Append(acked, File[i])
                /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = IF lost THEN retransmits[i] + 1 ELSE 0]
          /\ \A j \in 1..Len(File) : retransmits'[j] <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retransmits>>

TypeOK == /\ sent \in Seq(File)
          /\ acked \in Seq(File)
          /\ retransmits \in [1..Len(File) -> 0..MAX_RETRIES]

====
